summary: Reports indicate a Russian Ka-52 helicopter was downed by a 59th Brigade FPV drone near Nadiivka, Donetsk region, with follow-up strikes eliminating the crew during evacuation. Ukrainian forces also struck a Russian BUK air defense system near Bolshoy Sokolny Island with an FPV drone. Footage shows Ukrainian pilots using tactics like throwing debris at Russian positions before strikes, and in one instance, a Russian soldier charging an FPV drone with a bayonet was killed. A separate attack by Iranian-backed militia used a fiber-optic FPV drone against US Victory Base in Iraq. Ukrainian President Zelensky awarded the Order of Courage, 2nd class, to troops involved in downing the Ka-52.
